title: [國際文宣]喺Twitter只要有一萬Retweet同Like已經好勁，香港人應該好易做到

replies.msg:
Twitter又唔係紅底又幫我地消滅五毛
仲可以直接聯絡外國記者同政府官員
點解都仲係咁少人加入文宣戰？

外國官員應該都仲好留意香港
但係外國市民對我地嘅關心已經慢慢減退緊
好多吹哂大雞要搵人幫手spread,有關929嘅tweet
結果都只係得500 retweet咋...
Twitter嘅世界黎講 一萬retweet已經係好勁 羊群心理會吸引更多人留意
幫吓手啦各位Retweet同like啦各位手足,
真係撳幾個制就幫到手架喇...求吓你地啦...

想幫手嘅手足可以去依個telegram channel度拎每日任務
https://t.me/twittermansyunzou

雖然我覺得香港人個個都係醒目仔唔駛教
但如果真係唔知twitter點玩嘅話都有手足整咗張教學

https://twitter.com/natalieforhk/status/1176748666830249984
如果更加熱心嘅手足 希望可以幫手share埋上IG啊FB之類搵埋fd一齊玩twitter

加入咗我地twitter戰線嘅手足
除咗follow啲出名嘅記者,外媒account同英美議員之外
記得出個tweet自我介紹吓
然後落依個tag: #FollowBackHongKong
跟住就會有手足follow你架喇

如果只係得外國官員留意而市民唔知咩事
佢地都好快會失去動力
我地要嘅係民主國家支持
所以首先要得到佢地人民嘅支持啊

https://lih.kg/efrwmS

加入retweet大軍
將香港人以及支持我地嘅人流嘅血同汗發揮到最大功效

需要一個a/c 集中每日出最重要10幾個po
大家集中跟住retweet

（類似金水潘小濤果種a/c)

真係人人1分鐘就可以retweet完同like完

而家有幾個a/c都多人retweet。。。

大家向fb宣傳下集中follow兩三個a/c

日日跟住retweet 打卡

5分鐘一定tweet完

港人治港 剷除共黨
正名!
狗 --> 港共走狗/共狗打手/金腰帶
示威者 --> 香港人
死-->被自殺
藍絲-->港共流氓

光頭警長劉Sir前往内地安家，民眾甚感期待
光頭走狗劉Sir前往内地安家，民眾甚感期待

[底已起] 又有隻奶共狗話示威者係曱甴
[底已起] 又有隻奶共狗話香港人係曱甴

對準政權! 撐政府一律捆綁式形容!

[twitter懶人包]全部同我入泥！！！
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區
https://lih.kg/1602587

依個懶人包正啊！

經過幾個月的抗爭，大家應該明白到獨立調查委員會根本冇乜用！佢哋的暴力同性侵根本涉及整個警隊！亦即係已經冇所謂白警！所以就算成立到獨立調查委員會好大機會只會搵幾條友出黎祭旗！其他大部分強姦！殺人！棄屍的黑警根本唔會有事！因為政苦冇可能拉曬全部黑警！問題根源根本唔會解決到！所以建議大家係10月1日重寫五大訴求!將其中的成立獨立調查委員會改為解散警隊！要做重新做呢項的文宣，包括連濃牆、遊行時的海報、國際文宣等等

推
日日都有拎任務

次次call 馬叫人玩Twitter,reddit
都成班笠水話自己英文屎,結果係推比其他人做

考dse英文就得, 到救港就唔付出

[#每日任務]10月5日要推嘅tweet part1
1. Nancy Pelosi(南希·裴洛西，美國眾議院議長): Hong Kong invoking the Emergency Regulations Ordinance to ban face masks does not answer the people's grievances, and only intensifies concerns about freedom of expression. https://twitter.com/SpeakerPelosi/status/1180127746707660800?s=19
What did @realDonaldTrump promise China in exchange for interfering in our election? An easier deal on trade? Ignoring crackdown on Hong Kong’s pro-democracy movement? Condoning repression of religious freedom? #TruthExposed https://twitter.com/SpeakerPelosi/status/1180098404669693952?s=19
👆🏻多謝完就算，唔好多嘴，因為同美國兩黨紛爭有關

2. Reuters(路透社): Hong Kong leader Carrie Lam says a ban on face masks would take effect on Saturday under emergency laws that allow authorities to ‘make any regulations whatsoever’ in whatever they deem to be in the public interest. More here: https://twitter.com/Reuters/status/1180140519156076546?s=19

3. BBC World News(英國廣播公司國際新聞): Hong Kong: Face mask ban prompts thousands to protest https://twitter.com/BBCWorld/status/1180146824658767873?s=19

4. Sky News Breaking(英國天空新聞台): Sky Sources: a 14-year-old boy has been shot in the thigh during protests in Hong Kong and is in a serious condition in hospital
https://twitter.com/SkyNewsBreak/status/1180150638107353088?s=19
BREAKING: A 14-year-old boy is in serious condition after being shot during #HongKongProtests.
Special correspondent @AlexCrawfordSky interviews an eyewitness.
Get the latest on this #breakingnews story here:
https://twitter.com/skynews/status/1180154237952675842?s=21

5. The Independent(英國獨立報): Boy shot by off-duty policeman in Hong Kong as protests escalate https://twitter.com/Independent/status/1180156596967673858?s=19

6. Bloomberg(彭博): Protesters called for a mass show of defiance against Hong Kong’s newly imposed mask ban as the government prepared to exercise rarely used powers to quell the unrest https://twitter.com/business/status/1180171240188907521?s=19

7. Uffe Elbæk(丹麥國會議員): The conflict between the citizens and the authorities just go up and up and up in Hong Kong. This can end bloody horrible. I really fear for the safety of the activists and the democratic movement in the city. #StandwithHK #eye4hk #dkpol https://twitter.com/uffeelbaek/status/1180157475099697154?s=19

8. Don Bacon(唐·培根，內布拉斯加州眾議院議員): Our loyalties and hearts should always be with the people of Hong Kong and Taiwan. We can never forget that China is a Communist dictatorship that has murdered millions upon millions of its own people and has repressed freedom of speech and religion.
https://twitter.com/RepDonBacon/status/1179744185408278528?s=19

9. Financial Times(金融時報): China and Hong Kong: the ultimate test of authoritarian rule https://twitter.com/FT/status/1180181573620191232?s=19

10. The Economist(經濟學人): The emergency laws allow the chief executive to issue “any regulations whatsoever” in case of “emergency or public danger” https://twitter.com/TheEconomist/status/1180268900073791488?s=19

11. Rick Scott(瑞克·史考特，佛羅里達州聯邦參議員): Protestors in Hong Kong wear face masks to protect themselves from tear gas, & their families from threats. Chief Exec Lam is stripping another right from the people of HK – who are fighting for their freedom.
This is shameful & just the beginning. #StandwithHongKong https://twitter.com/SenRickScott/status/1180189173522862081?s=19
The violence against pro-democracy protestors is becoming more dangerous and more common.
Communist China could easily put an end to this unrest by allowing the people of Hong Kong to regain their human dignity and freedom! #StandWithHongKong https://twitter.com/SenRickScott/status/1180257966047580160?s=19

12. Human Rights Watch(人權監察): Hong Kong: Face Mask Ban Violates Assembly Rights | Revoke Immediately https://twitter.com/hrw/status/1180258848499736577?s=19
